# services.crowdsec

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.crowdsec`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.crowdsec.autoUpdateService` | `boolean` | Whether to enable if `true` `cscli hub update` will be executed daily. See `https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/cscli/cscli_hub_update/` for more information. |
| `services.crowdsec.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable CrowdSec Security Engine. |
| `services.crowdsec.group` | `string` | The group to run crowdsec as |
| `services.crowdsec.hub` | `submodule` | Hub collections, parsers, AppSec rules, etc. |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.appSecConfigs` | `list of string` | List of hub appsec configurations to install |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.appSecRules` | `list of string` | List of hub appsec rules to install |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.branch` | `string` | The git branch on which cscli is going to fetch configurations. See `https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/configuration/crowdsec_configuration/#hub_branch` for more information. |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.collections` | `list of string` | List of hub collections to install |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.parsers` | `list of string` | List of hub parsers to install |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.postOverflows` | `list of string` | List of hub postoverflows to install |
| `services.crowdsec.hub.scenarios` | `list of string` | List of hub scenarios to install |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig` | `submodule` | The configuration for a crowdsec security engine. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.acquisitions` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of acquisition specifications, which define the data sources you want to be parsed. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/data_sources/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.contexts` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of additional contexts to specify. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/next/log_processor/alert_context/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.notifications` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of notifications to enable and use in your profiles. Note that for now, only the plugins shipped by default with CrowdSec are supported. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/notification_plugins/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.parsers` | `submodule` | The set of parser specifications. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/parsers/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.parsers.s00Raw` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of stage s00-raw specifications. Most of the time, those are already included in the hub, but are presented here anyway. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/parsers/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.parsers.s01Parse` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of stage s01-parse specifications. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/parsers/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.parsers.s02Enrich` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of stage s02-enrich specifications. Inside this list, you can specify Parser Whitelists. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/whitelist/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.patterns` | `list of package` | A list of files containing custom grok patterns. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.postOverflows` | `submodule` | The set of Postoverflows specifications. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/next/log_processor/parsers/intro#postoverflows> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.postOverflows.s01Whitelist` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of stage s01-whitelist specifications. Inside this list, you can specify Postoverflows Whitelists. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/whitelist/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.profiles` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of profiles to enable. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/profiles/intro> for more details. |
| `services.crowdsec.localConfig.scenarios` | `list of (YAML 1.1 value)` | A list of scenarios specifications. See <https://docs.crowdsec.net/docs/scenarios/intro> for details. |
| `services.crowdsec.name` | `string` | Name of the machine when registering it at the central or local api. |
| `services.crowdsec.openFirewall` | `boolean` | Whether to automatically open firewall ports for `crowdsec`. |
| `services.crowdsec.package` | `package` | The crowdsec package to use. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings` | `submodule` | Set of various configuration attributes |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.capi` | `submodule` | CAPI Configuration attributes |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.capi.credentialsFile` | `null or absolute path` | The CAPI credential file to use. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.console` | `submodule` | Console Configuration attributes |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.console.configuration` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Attributes inside the console.yaml file. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.console.tokenFile` | `null or absolute path` | The Console Token file to use. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.general` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Settings for the main CrowdSec configuration file. Refer to the defaults at <https://github.com/crowdsecurity/crowdsec/blob/master/config/config.yaml>. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.lapi` | `submodule` | LAPI Configuration attributes |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.lapi.credentialsFile` | `null or absolute path` | The LAPI credential file to use. |
| `services.crowdsec.settings.simulation` | `YAML 1.1 value` | Attributes inside the simulation.yaml file. |
| `services.crowdsec.user` | `string` | The user to run crowdsec as |
